scope.summary: Implement SaaS email magic-link auth and recovery-key-backed device registration. This contract tracks the provider-backed auth/device hardening slice after the backend foundation compiles.
goals: Replace dev magic-link token return with an SMTP/provider delivery path proven through local MailHog
Add rate limiting and audit events for auth/device operations
Add device revoke behavior that immediately rejects revoked bearer tokens

acceptance.description: Magic-link request/verify through MailHog SMTP delivery, token single-use, and device revoke are proven against a running Postgres-backed server.

verification.manual: Attach non-secret curl/API transcript showing MailHog delivery with dev token disabled, token single-use, device registration, list, revoke, and revoked-token rejection.
